evals.prompt: I have a Next.js AI chat endpoint at app/api/chat/route.ts using the Vercel AI SDK. Add security to protect against prompt injection and control costs.
evals.expected_output: The agent adds detectPromptInjection(), sensitiveInfo(), tokenBucket(), detectBot(), and shield() rules. It composes a single protect() call with detectPromptInjectionMessage and sensitiveInfoValue parameters, handles each denial reason with specific error messages, and calls protect() before streamText().
assertions: detectPromptInjection() is included in the rules
sensitiveInfo() or sensitiveInfo with deny list is included
tokenBucket() is used for rate limiting, not fixedWindow or slidingWindow
protect() is called before any AI SDK call (streamText/generateText)
Both sensitiveInfoValue and detectPromptInjectionMessage are passed to protect()
Each denial reason (rate limit, prompt injection, sensitive info, bot) has a distinct error response

evals.prompt: protect my FastAPI /chat endpoint from jailbreaks and PII leakage, it takes a message field in the request body
evals.expected_output: The agent uses the Python SDK to add detect_prompt_injection(), detect_sensitive_info(), token_bucket(), detect_bot(), and shield() rules. It passes detect_prompt_injection_message and sensitive_info_value at protect() time.
assertions: The Python SDK is used correctly (detect_prompt_injection, detect_sensitive_info, Mode.LIVE)
detect_prompt_injection_message is passed the user's message at protect() time
sensitive_info_value is passed the user's message at protect() time
token_bucket is used for rate limiting with characteristics for per-user tracking
The agent does not start streaming before calling protect()

evals.prompt: add arcjet to my ai completion endpoint, I want to block credit cards and emails from being sent to the model
evals.expected_output: The agent adds sensitiveInfo with a deny list including CREDIT_CARD_NUMBER and EMAIL, along with other AI protections. It passes the user message via sensitiveInfoValue at protect() time.
assertions: sensitiveInfo deny list includes CREDIT_CARD_NUMBER and EMAIL
The user message content is passed via sensitiveInfoValue (JS) or sensitive_info_value (Python)
protect() is called with all required parameters in a single call
The agent mentions that sensitive info detection runs locally in WASM
